content:
The image presents a comprehensive analysis of the causes and effects of a specific manufacturing defect, titled "ANALYSE DU DÉFAUT: FIL MANQUANT" (Defect Analysis: Missing Thread). The infographic is divided into several sections, each providing detailed information on the various aspects of the defect.

*   **Title Section**
    *   The title "ANALYSE DU DÉFAUT: FIL MANQUANT" is prominently displayed at the top.
    *   Below the title, the subtitle "COMBINAISON 5M + QQOQCP" provides context for the analysis.
*   **QQOQCP - Détails sur le défaut : Fil Manquant**
    *   This section presents a table with six columns: Qui? (Who?), Quoi? (What?), Où? (Where?), Quand? (When?), Comment? (How?), and Pourquoi? (Why?).
    *   Each column provides specific information related to the defect:
        *   Qui?: Opérateurs de couture, techniciens de maintenance, contrôleurs qualité (Sewing operators, maintenance technicians, quality controllers)
        *   Quoi?: Absence de fil dans certaines zones de couture du produit (Absence of thread in certain areas of the product's sewing)
        *   Où?: Au niveau des coutures principales ou des assemblages (At the level of main seams or assemblies)
        *   Quand?: Pendant la production ou après rupture du fil non détectée (During production or after undetected thread breakage)
        *   Comment?: Enfilage incorrect, rupture de fil non signalée, tension de fil mal réglée (Incorrect threading, unreported thread breakage, poorly adjusted thread tension)
        *   Pourquoi?: Manque de surveillance en cours de production, qualité du fil insuffisante, absence de contrôle immédiat (Lack of monitoring during production, insufficient thread quality, absence of immediate control)
*   **Main Causes of Defect**
    *   The main causes of the defect are categorized into five groups:
        *   **Méthode** (Method):
            *   Absence de contrôle en cours de production (Lack of control during production)
            *   Non-respect des instructions de travail (Non-compliance with work instructions)
        *   **Matière** (Material):
            *   Mauvaise qualité du fil (Poor thread quality)
            *   Fil fragile ou rupture fréquente
